headline: Return On Capital Employed Overview: Amazon.com
summary: Amazon.com (NASDAQ: AMZN) posted a 16.53% decrease in earnings from Q1. Sales, however, increased by 17.84% over the previous quarter to $88.91 billion. Despite the increase in sales this quarter, the decrease in earnings may suggest Amazon.com is not utilizing their capital as effectively as possible.

headline: ROCE Insights For Alphabet
summary: In Q2, Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) saw a decline in both earnings and sales. Earnings decreased by 27.53% to $7.76 billion, and sales dropped by 6.95% to $38.30 billion. Alphabet reached earnings of $10.70 billion and sales of $41.16 billion in Q1.
